explanation: The diagram shows only two business services (Service-A and Service-B), each deployed as a small cluster with multiple instances. This does not indicate excessive fragmentation into many tiny, single-purpose business services. Most other components (Zuul, Config Center, Eureka, RabbitMQ, Zipkin, Hystrix Dashboard, Spring Boot Admin) are typical infrastructure/platform services in a microservice ecosystem rather than evidence of nano business services. Based on this view, Nano Service smell is unlikely.
